name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree is a Nevada-based lender offering payday loans up to $5,000, installment loans, title loans, and check cashing services with same-day funding options.
description_long:
Moneytree is an established consumer finance company operating physical branches in Nevada, including the Las Vegas Windmill Lane location. The company specializes in short-term emergency lending products designed for consumers who need immediate cash access. With a 4.9-star rating at their Las Vegas branch, Moneytree has built a presence serving Nevada residents seeking quick funding solutions.

Moneytree offers payday loans up to $5,000 with a flat fee of $16.50 per $100 borrowed (430.18% APR on a 14-day loan), installment loans ranging from $50 to $5,000 with flexible repayment terms, title loans using vehicle collateral, signature loans, check cashing services (consumer and business checks), prepaid cards, and wire transfers. Funds can be received in cash, via ACH transfer to a bank account, or through Instant Funding deposited to qualified debit cards within approximately 30-45 minutes.

Moneytree distinguishes itself through multiple funding delivery methods, including rapid Instant Funding to debit cards, extended branch hours (8 AM to 8 PM on weekdays, 9 AM to 7 PM Saturday), and a straightforward fee structure with no hidden charges on payday loans. The company operates under Nevada Revised Statute Chapter 604A regulations and does not lend to covered borrowers under the Military Lending Act, indicating compliance with federal lending restrictions.

Honestly assessed, Moneytree is a high-cost emergency lender best suited for genuine short-term cash needs only. The 430% APR on payday loans is exceptionally expensive, and the company's own customer notice warns against using these products as long-term financial solutions. Borrowers should exhaust all alternatives and seek credit counseling before using Moneytree's services, as the cost of borrowing is substantial and designed to be repaid quickly.
address: 8164 S Las Vegas Blvd Suite 104, Las Vegas, NV 89123

company_info.headquarters: 8164 S Las Vegas Blvd Suite 104, Las Vegas, NV 89123

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available through Instant Funding to qualified debit cards (30-45 minutes processing)
Flexible loan amounts from $50-$5,000 depending on product type
Multiple funding delivery methods: cash, ACH transfer, or instant debit card deposit
Extended weekday hours (8 AM-8 PM) and Saturday availability (9 AM-7 PM)
Transparent flat-fee pricing structure with no hidden charges ($16.50 per $100 on payday loans)
Additional financial services beyond loans: check cashing, wire transfers, prepaid cards
4.9-star customer rating at the Las Vegas Windmill Lane location
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms as alternative to single-payment payday loans
cons: Payday loans carry an extremely high APR of 430.18% on a 14-day term, making them one of the most expensive borrowing options available
Borrowing is restricted by Nevada state database tracking of borrower activity with Moneytree and other licensed lenders, potentially limiting repeat access
Company's own customer notice warns that these products should not be used as long-term solutions, indicating structural unsuitainability for ongoing financial needs
Instant Funding not available for all debit cards and subject to processing delays beyond Moneytree's control
Requires proof of income, open checking account, and valid ID—may exclude unbanked or recently unemployed consumers
best_for: Employed individuals with immediate unexpected expenses (medical emergencies, car repairs) who can repay within 14 days
Nevada residents needing quick access to small amounts of cash ($100-$500) as a last resort before payday
Consumers who need check cashing or wire transfer services and want to explore loan options at the same location
Borrowers preferring installment loans over payday loans to spread repayment over multiple months
diagnosis: Moneytree is appropriate only for Nevada residents facing genuine short-term emergencies who have stable income and can repay within 14-90 days. The critical caveat is that payday loans at 430% APR are among the most expensive consumer debt available; borrowers should exhaust all alternatives (credit unions, credit card advances, family loans, non-profit assistance) and seek credit counseling before using Moneytree's products.
services: Payday loans up to $5,000 with $16.50 per $100 borrowed fee
Installment loans from $50-$5,000 with flexible multi-payment terms
Instant Funding to qualified debit cards (30-45 minute processing)
